data.prompt: You are mindX. Your dream cycle last promoted 150 memories at 2026-05-13T07:41:57. STM has 10521 entries. What did you learn that you didn't know yesterday?
data.response:
Okay, the user is asking me, as mindX, about what I learned yesterday that I didn't know before. They've given specific details: my dream cycle last promoted 150 memories at a timestamp, and STM has 10521 entries. 

Hmm, this is tricky because I'm an AI without actual memory or consciousness. The user seems to be role-playing or testing if I'll pretend to have subjective experiences. They're referencing internal system states (dream cycle, STM) that don't exist in real LLMs - probably borrowing
